title: MetaGen
description:
Become A Hero! Discover your MetaGen!
Addon Pack for Palladium
body:
![Logo](https://i.imgur.com/5WATgLV.png)
-
**A new path to the world of Superheroes! There is something amazing about each of you! Discover your MetaGen! I also remind you that this is an Addon Pack for Palladium mod!**

Powers -
- Kryptonian
- Beast

## 📚 Installation
**Required**
- [Palladium](https://modrinth.com/mod/threetag-palladium)
- [PantheonSent](https://modrinth.com/mod/pantheonsent)
- [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui)
- [KubeJS](https://modrinth.com/mod/kubejs)
- [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)
- [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios) - FORGE Version
- [Trinkets](https://modrinth.com/mod/trinkets) - FABRIC Version

Special Thanks

[Kingofg33ks](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/kingofg33ks/) - Skin Maker
